name: The Forest of Graye
description:
You are in a hardwood forest, walking through noisy leaves.  There is a
sheer cliff face to the west, rising up above the forest.  There is a &R&RSIGN&n
nailed neatly on the cliff wall.

extra_descriptions.description:
The sign reads:

******************************
*                            *
*       The Graye Area       *
*         Written By:        *
*      Aten of GenericMUD    *
*         April 1994         *
*                            *
*         Modified to        *
*         Wardome Mud        *
*         By Heimdall        *
*                            *
*                            *
******************************
The face of the cliff seems impossible to scale.
